comment.body:
I’ve seen a lot of bearish flow today for next Friday. Just like the market is concentrated in the Mag 7, the bearish positioning is concentrated in those positions as well 

And I think people are expecting higher volatility (Alma can update on this better). I don’t think they’ll get it. I also don’t think that 3/11 low will break easily because there were definitely players who entered semis that day and took profits

I think positioning right now is way too bearish. And that can cause a snap. But Alma can update better after today

comment.body:
Everyone has a bias. It’s not a bad thing. It’s letting emotions dictate your bias that leads to poor decisions.

Just like when they say “topping is a process.” That’s completely stupid. Everything in life is a process. Everyone has opinions. Everyone has a different perspective 

That’s why it comes down to risk management, patterns, and probabilities for me mostly. You just have to move forward each day keeping your emotions in check

comment.body:
Example: August of 2007

Hit a low on August 16th 2007 and reversed +6% by the next day. Stabilized and continued higher. Then, proceeded to steadily rally to new ATH by October 

I only use that example because bear traps and markets can be extreme. But you go to more recent like in 2022. It took tech 3 days in some cases to reverse 10% from the lows
